title: Google Antigravity CLI Full Walkthrough
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that extends IDE capabilities into an agent-first era. It enables developers to manage agents across workspaces that operate autonomously across the editor, terminal, and browser to plan and execute complex end-to-end software development tasks.
